---
title: "Ugur Aytun"
output: html_document
#date: "2024-10-20"
---



## ![](C:/Users/Lenovo/Documents/GitHub/uguraytun/docs/portrait.jpg){width=25%}
<span style="font-size: 12pt;">
I am an Assistant Professor of Economics at Dumlupınar University and a Postdoctoral Researcher at Middle East Technical University. My research uses large-scale administrative microdata and causal inference methods to study how policy shocks shape labor markets, firms, and trade. </span>
 

#
#
#
#
#



##  Upcoming presentations:
#
#


2^nd^ Spring Meeting of Turkish Economic Association (Istanbul)


38^th^ European Association for Labour Economists (EALE) Conference 2026 (Barcelona)
